close_reason: Added wait_until helper for async state polling. Removed sleeps where :sys.get_state synchronizes. Kept 2 intentional time delays for sweep retention testing.
description: Replace 9 instances of Process.sleep at lines 295, 327, 338, 351, 370, 378, 501, 503, 530 with message-based synchronization. These sleeps wait for async Task operations to register in server state - should use send/assert_receive pattern instead.
title: Refactor resolver/server_test.exs: replace Process.sleep with message passing
